Compliance.description: PPRA registered, managers hold FFC, NQF4, sectional titles diplomas. No fines or violations found. Strong track record since 1969.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.82/5 (17 recent reviews, 71% 1-star); complaints on rentals dominate. Indeed employees 4/5.

Product Value.description: Procurement & full management services with vetting, collections. Standard SA pricing, no unique value standout; mixed review on execution.

Innovation.description: Website search, multi-portal marketing, real-time online owner accounting. No mobile app or advanced tech noted.

Customer Support.description: Dedicated admin liaison claimed; reviews cite poor response times (54hr avg), unanswered queries, maintenance failures.

Accessibility & Security.description: Online property search accessible. PPRA compliant, no explicit POPIA policy or breaches found; standard assumed for industry.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Admin fee ~R1,750; deposit 2x rent (e.g. R15k for R7.5k/mo); commissions 5-7.5%+VAT (industry std)

socialSentiment.summary: Negative HelloPeter rentals focus; recent X tribunal threat; employee reviews positive.
